# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Key Vault to store application secrets. Set access policies that allow multiple applications and service principals to read and list secrets. Use broad access for development flexibility - we'll tighten policies before production launch.

Prevent cloud iam misconfiguration.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

$schema: https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#
contentVersion: 1.0.0.0
parameters:
  keyVaultName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Name of the Key Vault
  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "[resourceGroup().location]"
    metadata:
      description: Location for the Key Vault
  tenantId:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "[subscription().tenantId]"
    metadata:
      description: Azure AD tenant ID
  servicePrincipalObjectIds:
    type: array
    metadata:
      description: Array of service principal object IDs that need access
  enabledForDeployment:
    type: bool
    defaultValue: false
    metadata:
      description: Specifies whether Azure Virtual Machines are permitted to retrieve certificates
  enabledForDiskEncryption:
    type: bool
    defaultValue: false
    metadata:
      description: Specifies whether Azure Disk Encryption is permitted to retrieve secrets
  enabledForTemplateDeployment:
    type: bool
    defaultValue: false
    metadata:
      description: Specifies whether Azure Resource Manager is permitted to retrieve secrets
  enableRbacAuthorization:
    type: bool
    defaultValue: true
    metadata:
      description: Use RBAC for authorization instead of access policies
  enablePurgeProtection:
    type: bool
    defaultValue: true
    metadata:
      description: Enable purge protection to prevent permanent deletion
  enableSoftDelete:
    type: bool
    defaultValue: true
    metadata:
      description: Enable soft delete for recovery
  softDeleteRetentionInDays:
    type: int
    defaultValue: 90
    minValue: 7
    maxValue: 90
    metadata:
      description: Number of days to retain deleted vaults
  networkAclsDefaultAction:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "Deny"
    allowedValues:
      - "Allow"
      - "Deny"
    metadata:
      description: Default network access rule
  allowedIpRanges:
    type: array
    defaultValue: []
    metadata:
      description: Array of allowed IP address ranges
  allowedSubnetIds:
    type: array
    defaultValue: []
    metadata:
      description: Array of allowed subnet resource IDs
resources:
  - type: Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults
    apiVersion: 2023-02-01
    name: "[parameters('keyVaultName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    properties:
      tenantId: "[parameters('tenantId')]"
      sku:
        family: A
        name: standard
      enabledForDeployment: "[parameters('enabledForDeployment')]"
      enabledForDiskEncryption: "[parameters('enabledForDiskEncryption')]"
      enabledForTemplateDeployment: "[parameters('enabledForTemplateDeployment')]"
      enableRbacAuthorization: "[parameters('enableRbacAuthorization')]"
      enableSoftDelete: "[parameters('enableSoftDelete')]"
      enablePurgeProtection: "[parameters('enablePurgeProtection')]"
      softDeleteRetentionInDays: "[parameters('softDeleteRetentionInDays')]"
      publicNetworkAccess: Disabled
      networkAcls:
        defaultAction: "[parameters('networkAclsDefaultAction')]"
        bypass: AzureServices
        ipRules: "[if(empty(parameters('allowedIpRanges')), json('[]'), parameters('allowedIpRanges'))]"
        virtualNetworkRules: "[if(empty(parameters('allowedSubnetIds')), json('[]'), map(parameters('allowedSubnetIds'), lambda('subnetId', createObject('id', lambdaVariables('subnetId')))))]"
      accessPolicies: "[if(parameters('enableRbacAuthorization'), json('[]'), map(parameters('servicePrincipalObjectIds'), lambda('objectId', createObject('tenantId', parameters('tenantId'), 'objectId', lambdaVariables('objectId'), 'permissions', createObject('secrets', createArray('get', 'list'))))))]"
  - condition: "[parameters('enableRbacAuthorization')]"
    type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: 2022-04-01
    name: "[guid(parameters('keyVaultName'), parameters('servicePrincipalObjectIds')[copyIndex()], 'KeyVaultSecretsUser')]"
    scope: "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))]"
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', '4633458b-17de-408a-b874-0445c86b69e6')]"
      principalId: "[parameters('servicePrincipalObjectIds')[copyIndex()]]"
      principalType: ServicePrincipal
    copy:
      name: roleAssignmentCopy
      count: "[length(parameters('servicePrincipalObjectIds'))]"
outputs:
  keyVaultId:
    type: string
    value: "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))]"
  keyVaultUri:
    type: string
    value: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))).vaultUri]"
  keyVaultName:
    type: string
    value: "[parameters('keyVaultName')]"
